stack: Next.js 15 static export · Cloudflare Pages · India-primary market

summary.business_type: SaaS tool site — document photo and government form utilities, India-primary
top_findings: Color contrast: 7 elements fail WCAG AA (gold #A87E10 at 3.58 ratio vs 4.5 minimum)
Meta description 184 chars (24 chars over 160-char limit — truncated mid-sentence in SERPs)
Mobile LCP 3.5s (Needs Improvement) — AdSense is primary culprit at 229KB/107ms
Desktop TBT 300ms — same AdSense cause, 6 long tasks on main thread
0 organic clicks from non-branded queries despite 129 indexed queries
quick_wins: Darken gold text #A87E10 → #7a5c06 for elements ≤13px (Lighthouse accessibility 96 → 99+)
Trim meta description to 155 chars ending on complete CTA
Rewrite titles for 4 GSC quick-win pages (pos 4–10, 0 clicks) to match search intent
Defer AdSense loading (drop mobile LCP from 3.5s → ~2.2s, performance score 90 → 95+)
Write signature cluster pillar blog post (7 tools, 0 editorial support)
issues_fixed_since_baseline: www duplicate content fixed (301 redirect working)
AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS + 2-year HSTS preload (preload-eligible)
www → non-www 301 redirect (FIXED since Jun 18)
robots.txt: all AI crawlers allowed; /_next/ disallowed (FIXED)
277-URL sitemap: 0 errors, 0 warnings
7 security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, COEP, COOP)
Server response time 7–8ms (Cloudflare CDN, optimal India latency)
Static export: full HTML content crawlable without JS

findings.title: Color contrast failures — 7 elements
findings.description: Gold brand color #A87E10 on #fcfbf8 background: ratio 3.58 (need 4.5 for normal text). Gold on white: 3.71. Affects eyebrow labels, stat text, country card dimension text at 11–13px.
findings.recommendation: Darken small-text gold from #A87E10 to #7a5c06 (ratio ~5.1). Only affects font-size ≤13px non-bold. Large bold gold headings can stay as-is.

findings.title: Meta description 184 characters (over 160 limit)
findings.description: Current meta description is 184 chars — Google truncates at ~160, cutting off mid-sentence. Reduces CTR from SERP.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite to 150–160 chars ending on complete CTA. Suggested: 'Free document photo tools for India — passport photos, visa photos, exam form resizing and government document images. Pick your country or exam and get started free.' (158 chars)

findings.title: CSP uses unsafe-inline + unsafe-eval
findings.description: Lighthouse flags unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval in script-src as XSS risk. Required by Next.js hydration and WASM (MediaPipe). wasm-unsafe-eval already present.
findings.recommendation: Add require-trusted-types-for 'script' where innerHTML not used. Migrate to nonce-based CSP in Next.js config when ready. Not blocking ranking.

findings.title: Canonical trailing slash mismatch
findings.description: Declared: https://easyphoto.in/ (with slash). Google's chosen canonical: https://easyphoto.in (without slash). GSC inspection: match: false.
findings.recommendation: Ensure consistent trailing slash handling site-wide. Not causing indexing failure but signals inconsistency.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: CLS: 0 (perfect) on both mobile and desktop
TTFB: 7–8ms (Cloudflare CDN serving from Singapore, optimal India latency)
Desktop LCP: 0.7s (Excellent)
Mobile TBT: 30ms (Excellent)
All /_next/static/ assets: Cache-Control max-age=31536000 immutable
next/image for all main content images
WASM models lazy-loaded from models.easyphoto.in R2 origin

findings.title: Mobile LCP 3.5s — Needs Improvement
findings.description: Google LCP target: <2.5s (Good). Current: 3.5s. Primary causes: Google AdSense (229 KB, 107ms mobile main thread) + render-blocking CSS (470ms savings). Desktop LCP is 0.7s — mobile only.
findings.recommendation: Defer AdSense loading via Intersection Observer or DOMContentLoaded listener. Expected result: mobile LCP drops to ~2.2s (Good range). Alternatively, inline critical CSS to remove render-blocking 14.5 KB CSS file.

findings.title: Desktop TBT 300ms — Needs Improvement
findings.description: Google TBT target: <200ms. Current desktop: 300ms. 6 long tasks; AdSense contributes 210ms on desktop main thread. Script evaluation: 722ms total.
findings.recommendation: Same AdSense deferral as above. Also investigate webpack bundle for splitting opportunities on heavy pages.

findings.title: No CrUX field data
findings.description: Google CrUX shows insufficient Chrome traffic volume. No field-measured LCP/INP/CLS data. Site is too new (~7 clicks/28 days).
findings.recommendation: No action needed. Will unlock automatically as organic traffic grows past ~1,000 users/28 days.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Lighthouse SEO: 100/100 mobile + desktop
Homepage title: 'easyPhoto — Document Photo & Form-Resize Tools for India' (60 chars, no cannibalization)
H1: 'Document photos that get accepted' (clear, intent-matched)
Canonical: https://easyphoto.in/ present on homepage
OG image: present and valid
robots meta: index/follow on all pages
All internal links crawlable with descriptive anchor text

findings.title: 0 CTR on 4 pages at pos 4–10
findings.description: GSC shows 4 pages at position 4–10 with 6–2 impressions and 0 clicks: /voter-id-photo-resizer/ (eci photo resize), /exam-resizer/ssc-cpo/ (cpo photo), /exam-requirements/army-agniveer/ (army photo, army signature), /tools/exam-package/ (csir net signature size). All have 0 CTR. Title tags don't match exact query intent.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite title tags to exactly match GSC query: e.g., 'ECI Voter ID Photo Resizer — Resize to 100KB Online Free', 'SSC CPO Photo Size & Resize — 35×45mm Online'. First organic non-branded clicks are within reach with this change alone.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Organization + WebSite in @graph block on all pages
SoftwareApplication on homepage (FIXED since Jun 18)
FAQPage on homepage and tool pages
BreadcrumbList on all tool and blog pages
BlogPosting with datePublished, dateModified, inLanguage: en-IN, author on all blog posts
CollectionPage on category/hub pages

findings.title: Missing SearchAction on WebSite schema
findings.description: WebSite schema has no potentialAction/SearchAction. Missed opportunity for Google Sitelinks Searchbox on branded queries.
findings.recommendation: Add SearchAction to WebSite schema pointing to exam-package or search route.

findings.title: sameAs has only Pinterest
findings.description: organizationSchema sameAs: ['https://www.pinterest.com/easyphoto0604/']. Single social profile limits entity disambiguation in AI knowledge graphs.
findings.recommendation: Add YouTube, LinkedIn, X when accounts are created.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: 277 pages in sitemap (comprehensive coverage)
All blog posts have datePublished, dateModified, inLanguage: en-IN, author
Answer-first formatting across blog content
Official source citations with 'verified June 2026' language
Privacy-first positioning clearly articulated

findings.title: Signature cluster — 7 tools, 0 editorial support
findings.description: 7+ signature tool pages exist but no blog post covers 'how to prepare signature for exam applications'. Major gap for queries like 'ssb form signature format', 'nta exam signature requirements'.
findings.recommendation: Write /blog/how-to-sign-exam-application-forms-india/ (1,800–2,200 words) covering size requirements, color, white background, scanned vs digital, with links to all 7 tools.

findings.title: PDF cluster — 8 tools, no hub
findings.description: 8 PDF tools, 2 blog posts, no cross-linking between posts, no pillar page. Missing queries like 'document size for ssc application'.
findings.recommendation: Write /blog/how-to-prepare-documents-for-exam-applications-india/ (2,000–2,500 words) covering all portal file size limits with links to PDF tools.

findings.title: Zero inline images in blog posts
findings.description: All 26+ blog posts have no inline images — no process screenshots, no sample outputs, no before/after visuals. Every top-10 competitor has images.
findings.recommendation: Add 1 process screenshot or annotated sample output to the top 6 blog posts (by GSC impressions). Use next/image with width/height for CLS prevention.

findings.title: Keep reading not cluster-aware
findings.description: BlogPostLayout shows same 2 posts for all articles regardless of topic. Exam readers see passport content.
findings.recommendation: Add cluster tag to BLOG_POSTS. Filter Keep Reading to same cluster. Reduces bounce, increases session depth.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: llms.txt present and comprehensive (200 OK)
All AI crawlers explicitly allowed: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot
Answer-first blog post formatting for AI extraction
Official source citations with 'verified June 2026' language
inLanguage: en-IN + author on all blog posts
Organization schema with knowsAbout array

findings.title: llms-full.txt not present
findings.description: llms.txt is good (~60 lines). A llms-full.txt with complete spec tables would increase AI citation frequency for spec queries ('what size is india passport photo?').
findings.recommendation: Create /llms-full.txt with complete spec tables for all supported countries and exam portals.

categories.name: Images
what_works: next/image for all hero and tool sample images
OG image: present and valid on homepage
Static icons optimized (icon.svg, og.png via gen-icons.mjs)

findings.title: No image sitemap extensions
findings.description: Sitemap has no <image:image> tags. Flag images and tool sample outputs not discoverable via Google Images.
findings.recommendation: Add image:image tags to sitemap for country/tool pages with sample outputs.

phases.name: Phase 1: Quick Wins
items: Trim homepage meta description to 155 chars
Rewrite 4 quick-win page titles to match GSC query intent
Defer AdSense loading to drop mobile LCP below 2.5s

phases.name: Phase 2: Content Authority
items: Write signature cluster pillar blog post (1,800–2,200 words)
Write PDF cluster editorial hub (2,000–2,500 words)
Add 1 process screenshot to top 6 blog posts

phases.name: Phase 3: Technical Polish
items: IndexNow ping on Cloudflare Pages deploy
Expand sameAs when additional social profiles created
Create llms-full.txt with complete spec tables
